compute_ancestry_q.description: Per-group mean Q from the instant_q cache for one (chrom, scale, K). Wraps /api/ancestry/groupwise_q (atlas_server.py @app.post('/api/ancestry/groupwise_q')).

import_slot.description: Capture one of the eight non-templated population slots (GET /api/population/{slot}) as a staging_population_slot_v0 layer. Source endpoint: server/population_endpoint.py.

import_ngsadmix_q.description: Capture one NGSadmix Q matrix at K (GET /api/population/ngsadmix/q/{K}) as a staging_ngsadmix_q_v0 layer. K must be in [2, 12].
